run_summary.summary: Found 3 active negotiations that don't appear to be in the pipeline yet — all from outreach that's been going on for weeks. Most urgent: Govee has a posting deadline of April 25 (TOMORROW) and the rate gap is huge ($1000 brand vs $3000 Liz). That window has basically closed — worth a quick call to Muriel to see if they're still interested at any rate, or just let it go. Dreo (also VanzoMedia/Yaki) is a better situation — posting window runs through April 30 and the Dreo misting fan is a perfect fit for the lake cabin summer content Liz pitched. Bedsure is going stale at 10 days with no response. All three deals have Liz doing her part (follow-ups sent Apr 22) but no brand replies yet.

suggestions.message: 🚨 Govee's posting deadline is TOMORROW (Apr 25) and Muriel hasn't replied to Liz's rate of $3000 — brand countered at $1000 back on Apr 2. That's a $2000 gap with basically no runway left. If Liz wants this deal, she'd have to drop rate significantly and film immediately. Recommend: shoot Muriel a quick message today asking if the campaign is still open and at what rate — otherwise close this one out.

Dreo's posting window runs through April 30 so there's still time. Liz pitched a great angle (lake cabin, no AC, perfect summer product). Yaki at VanzoMedia hasn't replied to the rate quote of $3000. Might be worth a quick check-in this week — if they don't respond by Apr 28 or so, it's probably safe to close.

Bedsure/Iris at Make Wonder INC has gone quiet since Liz sent her rate on Apr 13 — two follow-ups with no response. Liz's ask is $4500 (IG Reel + paid usage + 14-day link in bio). Worth giving it a few more days but if nothing by end of next week, close it out.

deals.next_action: Decide whether to pursue Govee — posting deadline Apr 25 has passed, rate gap is $1000 vs $3000. Contact Muriel today or close out.
deals.notes:

[Apr 2]: Muriel Tang (VanzoMedia) reached out — Govee TV Backlights, 1 IG Video, posting before Apr 25, brand budget $1000. DEADLINE PASSED.
